This project implements a machine learning pipeline for binary classification of drug-like compounds using ChEMBL bioactivity data. Features include molecular descriptors and fingerprints. Models such as SVM, RF, KNN, CNN, and SNN are evaluated, with classical methods achieving the best performance.

A complete Data & Information Quality framework (DaIQ-CRIMES-2025 project) for profiling, cleaning, and optimizing the "Boston Crime Incident Reports" dataset. It applies hybrid strategies (rule-based and machine learning) for handling missing data, record linkage, and anomaly correction.

An ongoing machine learning project building an end-to-end pipeline to classify barbell exercises using wristband accelerometer and gyroscope data. *NetGuard AI** is an enterprise-grade, machine learning-based framework for detecting and monitoring Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks in real-time. The system combines advanced feature engineering with a Random Forest classifier to analyze network traffic and identify attack patterns with good accuracy on test datasets.

Phishing websites steal sensitive user information by mimicking legitimate websites. This paper proposes a hyperparameter-optimized machine learning framework that improves phishing detection accuracy while reducing false positives using URL and website features.

A time-series machine learning framework for predicting next-day stock price direction using multiple models, including XGBoost, Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and LightGBM. The framework currently focuses on the China A-share market, using data from the market-data-platform A-share data lake.

Amazon EMR is a cloud big data platform for running large-scale distributed data processing jobs, interactive SQL queries, and machine learning applications using open-source analytics frameworks such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.

Built the Metamorphosis Development Index, a PCA-based framework for measuring multidimensional development across 170+ countries using World Bank indicators. Develop of a IA Model using classic machine learning. The goal is classify clients by it's features. Cluster K-Means algorithm used.

Robust hydro-climate data pipeline and machine learning framework. Implements hybrid Gradient Boosting and sequential Kalman Filtering for temporal downscaling, alongside multi-station LSTM neural networks for 3-year forward groundwater forecasting, validated using autocorrelation-corrected Mann-Kendall tests and SGI.

A simple from-scratch implementation of backpropagation in Python, focusing on how gradients are computed and propagated through a computational graph. The implementation is then applied to train a basic multilayer perceptron (MLP) using gradient descent, without external machine learning frameworks.

This work presents a hybrid cloud task scheduling framework combining quantum optimization and machine learning. Using QUBO-based QAOA and Gradient Boosting Regression, it optimizes task allocation, reducing makespan and execution cost while improving resource utilization and SLA compliance.

Real-time ML monitoring system detecting systemic failures across Data, Model, and API layers. Features a multi-agent architecture, synthetic drift engine (Z-score/KL Divergence), and adaptive thresholding to visualize and mitigate cascading risks in machine learning pipelines. Built with FastAPI, NumPy, and Chart.js.
